description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Select a full-service vending plan suitable for around 60 employees that costs at most $350 per month, includes card or other cashless payments, and start a quote request for two machines on the cheapest such plan.

tasks.instruction: Build a snack assortment of exactly eight items from the catalog where each item costs no more than $2.00, has a rating of at least 4 stars, and at least three of the chosen items are marked as healthy.

tasks.instruction: Choose a combo vending machine that can serve ZIP code 10001 with capacity for at least 350 products and submit an installation request selecting the 15th of next month as the preferred date.

tasks.instruction: Submit a maintenance request for a machine with a jammed coin or payment slot at the address 123 Main Street, Suite 400, choosing the earliest available morning appointment time and providing brief issue details and contact info.

expected_values.description: Coins are stuck and the coin slot is jammed; customers cannot insert coins.

tasks.instruction: Use the revenue calculator to estimate monthly revenue for a school location with 2 machines, 200 average daily users, an average vend price of $1.50, and a 30% commission share, then send these figures through a contact form requesting a revenue-share proposal.

tasks.instruction: Among snack machines that are no wider than 40 inches, compare two models and request a quote for one machine of whichever model has the higher product capacity.
